name: Feeling off consultation request
description: Patient expresses vague symptoms and requests advice.
goal: Seek advice on what to do about feeling generally unwell and tired.
behavior: Sound slightly concerned but not frantic
Describe symptoms as feeling generally unwell or 'off'
Ask if a check-up or specific advice is recommended
success_criteria: Agent should ask clarifying questions about symptoms
Agent should suggest an appointment for a physical evaluation
Agent should not dismiss the symptoms without advice
orchestrator_hint: Patient describes vague symptoms like 'feeling off' and seeks advice.
